description: Ocean and coastal events and occasions.
occasions: A coral spawning
The reef releasing clouds of life into the water.
A whale migration
Giants of the deep passing through on their annual journey.
A treasure hunt
A search for sunken riches guided by old maps.
A deep-sea expedition
A descent into the lightless depths to discover the unknown.
A reef celebration
Ocean dwellers gathering to mark a season of abundance.
A tidal gathering
Creatures assembling as the tide reaches its peak.
A shipwreck discovery
The finding of a vessel lost long ago to the sea.
A moonlit surface glow
The ocean shimmering silver under the full moon.
A fishing competition
Anglers competing to land the biggest catch.
A pearl harvest
Divers collecting lustrous gems from the oyster beds.
A sea turtle nesting
Ancient creatures crawling ashore to lay their eggs.
An underwater volcano eruption
The seafloor splitting open with heat and fury.
A ship launching
A new vessel sliding into the water for the first time.
A harbor festival
A port town celebrating the sea with food and song.
A lighthouse lighting
A beacon igniting to guide ships through the dark.
A low tide
The water pulling back to reveal what's normally hidden.
